# x402-pilot

> Developer-assistant for building on the **x402** payment protocol ‚Äî the HTTP-402,
> stablecoin-over-HTTP payment standard for APIs and AI agents. This plugin bundles
> the x402 protocol specs, transport bindings, scheme definitions, extension specs,
> and SDK surface docs for direct search, plus an agent and workflows for authoring
> and verifying facilitators, schemes, and extensions.

This is the **build/learn/verify** companion to the official **runtime** package
`@x402/mcp` (which enables paid tool calls and client auto-pay). x402-pilot does not
move money or pay for tools ‚Äî it helps you *write and verify x402 code*.

## Bundled corpora (search with Glob + Grep ‚Äî there is no precomputed index)

- [Protocol specs](.x402-specs/): 42 files ‚Äî the source of truth
  - `x402-specification-v1.md`, `x402-specification-v2.md` ‚Äî core protocol
  - `transports-v1/`, `transports-v2/` ‚Äî `http.md`, `mcp.md`, `a2a.md` bindings
  - `schemes/exact/` ‚Äî the `exact` scheme across 12 chains/VMs: `scheme_exact_evm.md`,
    `_sui.md`, `_svm.md`, `_aptos.md`, `_ton.md`, `_near.md`, `_stellar.md`, `_hedera.md`,
    `_algo.md`, `_concordium.md`, `_cardano.md`, `_keeta.md`, plus the chain-agnostic `scheme_exact.md`
  - `schemes/upto/`, `schemes/auth-capture/`, `schemes/batch-settlement/` ‚Äî other scheme families
  - `extensions/` ‚Äî `extension-offer-and-receipt.md`, `bazaar.md`,
    `eip2612_gas_sponsoring.md`, `erc20_gas_sponsoring.md`, `sign-in-with-x.md`,
    `builder_code.md`, `payment_identifier.md`, `extension-auth-hints.md`,
    `http-message-signatures.md`
  - `scheme_template.md`, `scheme_impl_template.md`, `transport_template.md`,
    `CONTRIBUTING.md` ‚Äî the authoring templates + the contribution workflow
- [Guides & concepts](.x402-docs/): 31 files ‚Äî getting-started, core-concepts,
  advanced-concepts, guides, dev-tools, schemes, extensions
- [SDK surface](.x402-sdk-docs/): `ts-core.md`, `ts-mcp.md`, `ts-extensions.md`,
  `python-x402.md`

## How to use

1. Read `agents/x402-pilot-agent.md` first ‚Äî it routes a topic to the right corpus
   and carries the contribution rules.
2. `Glob` for filenames (e.g. `.x402-specs/schemes/exact/scheme_exact_*.md`) and
   `Grep` for content within the matching `.x402-*/` directory.
3. Prefer a worked scheme spec (e.g. `scheme_exact_sui.md`) as a reference when
   implementing a new chain.

## Important

Your training data about x402 is likely **incomplete or outdated** ‚Äî x402 is a
2025‚Äì2026 protocol with an active v1‚Üív2 transition and a fast-moving extension
track. Always search and read these specs before generating x402 code, and never
hardcode a chain id, token address, or decimals: read them from the
`PaymentRequired` / scheme definition.
